content.en:
The origin world is overseas.

A large number of Eternal Masters have arrived, even the weakest Eternal Masters have to do it, they only need to pay to clean up the weaker Boundary's Boundary's creatures, and those powerful Realm's Frontier creatures don't need their help.

Soon.

The Ancient Demon Master, the Snow Maiden Master, and other Ten Realm-level controllers have all come here.

I saw that the controller of Jin Yu took out his bow and arrow, aimed at a creature of the end of the realm comparable to the master of the Nine Realms, and immediately shot out with an arrow.

Burst!

This arrow pierced through time and space, locking onto the opponent, making it impossible for the opponent to dodge, and directly piercing its body.

Then, the creature of the end of the world was killed and fell.

Not only that, but this arrow exploded directly, annihilating the surrounding time and space, and many creatures at the end of the world fell one by one.

It can be said that this arrow killed about a dozen Realm Realm creatures that were comparable to the Nine Realms-level Controllers.

"This arrow of the Jin Yu controller is quite good, and the shooting distance is extremely far, if it were us, we would not be able to do it!" said the Snow Maiden master.

However, many of the Ten Realm-level Masters did not have a relaxed look, they knew very well that no matter how many Nine Realm-level Masters Realm Creatures they killed, they could only be regarded as high-level cannon fodder.

At this moment, an incomparably terrifying Realm Realm creature appeared, comparable to the Ten Realm-level controllers.

Bang!!!

These Realms creatures comparable to the Ten Realms-level Masters slaughtered them, and a dense wave of creatures flooded the area.

"Let's shoot!"

Many of the will clones of the Ten Realm-level Masters took action one after another, fighting against these Realm-level creatures comparable to the Ten Realm-level Masters.

In the blink of an eye, the area turned into a battlefield, and countless creatures from the end of the world fought with countless eternal masters.

At all times, there are many creatures from the end of the world who have fallen, but there are also many eternal masters who have fallen.

After a period of time, the will clone of the Ten Realm-level Masters finally fell, but it also fought to kill the Boundary's Edge creatures that were comparable to the Ten Realms-level Masters.

Moreover, there are many means for the Ten Realm-level masters, so if they want to kill a will-clone of the Ten Realms-level masters, those creatures at the end of the realms must at least fall a few.

Time passed slowly, and those creatures at the end of the realm that were comparable to those of the Ten Realm-level masters fell more and more, and the scales of victory leaned towards the side of the Origin Realm Sea.

What they don't know, however, is that this is just the beginning.

this day.

In the depths of the Realm, a powerful creature comparable to the Ten Realm-level controllers emerged, densely packed, and there were quite a few of them, and soon they would exceed a hundred.

"It's over, and a large number of powerful creatures that rival us have appeared!"

The Ancient Demon Controller frowned.

The other Ten Realm-level controllers were extremely frightened, how could they fight this?

"Retreat into the Origin Realm Sea!"

Jin Yu's controller said helplessly.

The other Ten Realm-level Masters also felt that this was the only way, after all, they had already lost a lot of Will Clones, and their combat power had dropped greatly, and the number of powerful creatures comparable to them had already exceeded a hundred, and it was still increasing, and the ghost knows how many powerful creatures comparable to the Ten Realms-level Controllers!

If they don't retreat into the Origin Realm Sea, they are afraid that they will all fall.

Of course, retreating into the Origin Sea is also a way out of the question, these powerful creatures will definitely kill into the Origin Sea, but fighting in the Origin Sea at least has a local advantage.

Immediately.

Countless Eternal Masters have retreated into the Origin Realm Sea.

But at this moment, something that frightened the Ten Realm-level masters happened.

Rumble!!!!

An incomparably terrifying giant snake appeared, occupying an area, and its aura far surpassed that of the Ten Realm-level controllers, who were like ants in front of them.

"Boundary's Realm Creature !!! comparable to a half-step perfect master"

The Ancient Demon Controller shuddered.

Moreover, he felt that the strength of this giant snake was probably much stronger than that of his master, the Ten Elements Ancestor.

"That's a creature comparable to a half-step perfect master, oh my God, how can you resist this?"

Jin Yu's controllers were all trembling, not knowing what to do.

If the Ten Elements Ancestor and the Primordial Ancestor were still there, they would definitely be able to deal with it, but now they alone rely on these Ten Realm-level controllers, and they can't compete with this giant snake at all!

For a moment, they were desperate.

However, more desperation is yet to come.

Another terrifying creature appeared, it was an amazing golden bird, spreading its wings to cover many time and space, and the terrifying aura seemed to envelop the entire Origin Realm Sea, which was even more terrifying than the giant snake just now.

The Snow Maiden Controller said in despair: "Before leaving, Master also briefly told us about the situation of the half-step perfect controller, it is said that in the ruins of eternity, the half-step perfect controller is divided into ordinary half-step perfect controller, top half-step perfect controller and peak half-step perfect controller, and the strength of this golden bird has definitely reached the top half-step perfect controller, and even the strength of the giant snake just now is estimated to be very close to the top half-step perfect controller." "

"What should we do, or we lose the Origin Realm Sea, let's run away, escape into some treasure lands in the depths of the Realm, some treasure lands are forbidden to half-step perfect controllers to enter, and even if a large number of Ten Realm level controllers enter there, it is easy to get lost, and entering there may be able to save your life!"

A Ten Realm-level master said.

At this time, the Ancient Demon Controller smiled bitterly and said, "There is no hope, you can carefully sense the surroundings of the Origin Realm Sea!"

Soon, they sensed their surroundings, and in the time and space around the Origin Realm Sea, a terrifying creature comparable to a half-step perfect controller appeared.

Obviously, they surrounded the Origin Sea.

Moreover, a dense number of creatures from the end of the realm have appeared here, and this is to wipe out the Origin Realm Sea in one fell swoop!

"Guys, is there anything else you can do?"

Jin Yu asked.

The Snow Maiden Controller sighed at this time: "Maybe my junior brother Ye Tian has a way. "

"Endless Controller Ye Tian?" Jin Yu's controller wondered, "Didn't he go to the Eternal Ruins?"

The Snow Maiden said, "My junior brother has a way to leave a body in the Origin Realm Sea, as for the reason, I can't tell you, but the little junior brother has been practicing in retreat, and he has been in the Eternal Ruins for so long, maybe there is a way." "

The ancient demon controller said: "My junior brother's strength is very strong, almost invincible in the Origin Realm Sea, we all retreat into the Origin Realm Sea, in the case that the half-step perfect controller can't enter, these powerful creatures comparable to the half-step perfect controller will definitely not be able to enter, as long as my junior brother shoots out and kills these Ten Realm-level controller creatures, then our Origin Realm Sea is still safe, but we can't go out in the future, once we go out, we will be killed." "

"Let's get over the current crisis first!"

Jin Yu said.

Immediately, an incarnation of the Snow Maiden's controller came to the Terran territory and asked to see Ye Tian.

"Junior brother, there is a big crisis in the Origin Realm Sea, and I ask my junior brother to help. "

The Snow Maiden Controller begged to see her.

"Come in!"

Ye Tian said.

The Snow Maiden controller saw Ye Tian and quickly explained the situation.

Ye Tian said lightly: "I already knew the situation, but if I want to solve the trouble, it is not enough to rely on the cultivation of the Ten Realm-level Controllers at all, as long as those half-step Perfect Controller-level creatures reach a certain number, they can join forces to fight against the Origin Realm Sea's origin, and they still have a way to rush into the Origin Realm Sea, so I am preparing to attack the half-step Perfect Controller." "

"Is this too late?"

The Snow Maiden Controller asked.

"Of course, it's too late, I've already stepped into the half-step perfect controller, but I'm just suppressing the cultivation, after all, once I break through, it's not easy for me to enter the Origin Realm Sea. But now that the Origin Realm Sea is in trouble, I don't have to suppress it. Ye Tian said.

"Let's go, go to the Origin Realm overseas, the battlefield still has to be at the end of the Realm, so as not to cause great damage to the Origin Realm Sea!"

Ye Tian said calmly.

Seeing that Ye Tian was so calm, the Snow Maiden controller breathed a sigh of relief.
